description: Sebastien Borget discusses the integration of NFTs and the metaverse in Sandbox, highlighting collaborations with notable brands and artists like Snoop Dogg and Adidas. He emphasizes the potential for users to create and monetize their own content within this digital space, as well as the importance of community engagement and interoperability of assets.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Sebastien Borget outlines the vision for Sandbox as a platform for creating and monetizing virtual experiences, featuring collaborations with major brands and the role of NFTs in enhancing user engagement and creativity [t=4:72].
